title: Lyza
description: Lyza is an infamous cybercriminal known online. Truth is, everything she does is for the sake of humanity, even when the whole world is against it. She is a very independant and a weird individual, who loves the tingling sensation of the low and high audio frequencies, that even outperforms a Navy Sound Operator. She is even good at video games, where her username managed to be known by many, on top of global leaderboard. Her current whereabouts is unknown.

title: Lyza Y2k
description: Lyza Y2K fit with my friends' artstyle C:
